series_metadata.series_description: Record documenting the direct reimbursement to recipients, and assistance provided to obtain refunds from providers for out-of-pocket expenses for services rendered prior to receiving assistance from Medicaid. Files include voucher requests, provider billing information, copies of invoices, pharmacy receipts, credit card statements, power of attorney, and related correspondence that may contain confidential medical information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office ; Paper: in office
